title: Keeping Software Up to Date
drDigitalIntro:
Updates don't just add features — they fix security holes.
• When hackers find a weakness, an update closes it.
• Skipping updates leaves you vulnerable.
• Check your software version in Settings > About.

playgroundTask.goal: You checked your software version and explored WiFi settings

steps.say: Click About in the sidebar to check your software version.
Good — version 14.2.1. Now go to WiFi to check your connection.

drDigitalSuccess: You checked your software version and WiFi status. On a real computer, Settings will show if updates are available and let you install them.
drDigitalHint: Click About in the sidebar, then click WiFi.
